fields.inlineHelpText: The Internal user assigned to the asset who is responsible for following up on the asset. This is typically the BDA.
fields.label: Assigned User
fields.name: Assigned_User__c

fields.inlineHelpText: Used to prevent duplicate tasks from being created by the workflow "MLC Assign Task to BDA on Asset Creation"
fields.label: BDA Task Created?
fields.name: BDA_Task_Created__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The expected date of delivery of the tablet to the prospect.
fields.label: Expected Delivery Date
fields.name: Expected_Delivery_Date__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The text of the script that is used to create the video.
fields.label: Script Text
fields.name: Script_Text__c

fields.calculatedFormula: IF(text(Status__c) == "Returned",(2 * Shipping_Cost__c ) + Packaging_Cost__c, Price__c + Shipping_Cost__c +  Packaging_Cost__c )
fields.inlineHelpText: The total cost of the tablet. IF the tablet is returned, then the total cost is 2 times the shipping cost. If the tablet is not returned, then the total cost is the tablet price plus the shipping cost.
fields.label: Total Cost
fields.name: Total_Cost__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The Tracking ID for the tablet.
fields.label: Tracking ID
fields.name: Tracking_ID__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The Tracking URL for the tablet.
fields.label: Tracking Link
fields.name: Tracking_Link__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The Egnyte URL for the video that is on the tablet.
fields.label: Video Link
fields.name: Video_Link__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The Equipment Type of the Product
fields.label: Equipment Type
fields.name: Equipment_Type__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The current Stage for the Opportunity related the MLC Asset.
fields.label: Opportunity Stage
fields.name: Opportunity_Stage__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The opportunity to which the MLC Asset is related.
fields.label: Opportunity
fields.name: opportunity__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The Account related to the MLC Asset
fields.label: Account
fields.name: Account_lookup__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The URL to a copy of the Marketing Collateral.
fields.label: Collateral URL
fields.name: Collateral_URL__c

fields.inlineHelpText: Details on the personalized gift sent to the prospect
fields.label: Personalized Gift Details
fields.name: Personalized_Gift_Details__c
